$comment: MCP Server Generator config template. 'mcp-generator' exposes the generator itself as an MCP server so an agent can generate servers. The 'example-generated-server' block shows the shape of a server this tool produces (hosted, streamable-http, API-key auth). Replace ${VARS} from your environment/secret manager — never commit real tokens.

mcp-generator.description: Generate a production-ready MCP server from an OpenAPI/Postgres/GraphQL/codebase input.

example-generated-server.$comment: Example of what THIS tool outputs for a hosted server.
example-generated-server.description: Generated server wrapping Acme's REST API with auth, validation, rate limits, and great tool descriptions.

example-local-stdio.$comment: Example of a generated server you downloaded and run locally.
